per_entity_results.generated: Layer 2 Latency and Energy Measurement under Variable Traffic Loads
per_entity_results.reference: MoonGen Load Latency Benchmarks

per_entity_results.generated: This dataset captures latency and energy consumption metrics for Layer 2 packet forwarding under varying packet rates and sizes. The experiment uses synchronized traffic generation via MoonGen and controlled forwarding tests on two nodes, with configurations ensuring deterministic hardware behavior. Six runs per workload configuration measure latency histograms, energy usage, and transmission performance. Archive contents include setup scripts, per-run logs, and evaluation outputs for analyzing traffic impact on network device efficiency.
per_entity_results.reference: This experiment measures l2-load-latency in a two-node setup with MoonGen on one node as the load generator and libmoon on another node as the forwarding device under test. The benchmark tests different packet rates and packet sizes. Each measurement runs for fixed duration, records energy consumption on both machines, and stores latency histograms as CSV data and PNG plots for every parameter combination.

per_entity_results.generated: The artifact contains latency measurements and their frequencies recorded during a network load test, capturing packet transmission delays under specified packet rate and size conditions to evaluate system performance.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram CSV for one benchmark iteration containing the latency-distribution data produced for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: The artifact contains a histogram visualizing the distribution of packet latencies measured during a network load test, generated from a Lua-based traffic generator script executed with specified packet rate and size parameters.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram plot for one benchmark iteration of the MoonGen L2 load-latency experiment. It visualizes the filtered latency distribution for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: This script automates the setup of a software environment for performance testing, installing build dependencies, cloning a specific version of a library, and configuring system parameters such as disabling CPU turbo boost and enabling huge pages. It prepares the target system for experiments requiring controlled hardware behavior and deterministic execution conditions.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the DUT node by building libmoon and enabling hugepage support. It also disables CPU turbo boost for more stable forwarding measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: This script automates the deployment of a network load generation environment by installing dependencies, cloning a specified repository, building the MoonGen toolchain, and configuring system resources such as huge pages. It ensures reproducible setup through version-controlled source code checkout and standardized build procedures. The output confirms completion of prerequisite steps for subsequent performance testing or traffic simulation workflows.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the load-generator node by building MoonGen from the provided repository and branch. Additionally, it enables hugepage support for packet generation and latency measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: File copy from /home/warmuth/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.

per_entity_results.generated: Measures Layer 2 latency under load using 64-byte packets, logging results to a histogram CSV.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.

per_entity_results.generated: This script generates Layer 2 traffic to measure latency under variable packet rates and sizes, synchronizing with remote nodes to ensure coordinated testing. It captures latency histograms, energy consumption data, and uploads results for analysis, including visualized latency distributions. The workload emphasizes controlled traffic generation and precise timing measurement across distributed systems.
per_entity_results.reference: Looped benchmark that iterates over all configured packet-rate and packet-size combinations, synchronizes with the DUT, records node energy usage and runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example. Afterwards it uploads the generated latency histogram and plot.

per_entity_results.generated: The script executes a network latency benchmark by varying packet transmission rate and size, generating traffic through a load generator to measure end-to-end latency under different load conditions. Each iteration records latency histograms for analysis of performance characteristics.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the MoonGen l2-load-latency script with different values for packet rate and packet size, storing the measured latencies in a CSV file, generating a plot, and uploading both artifacts after each run.

per_entity_results.generated: Executes Layer 2 forwarding latency measurement with dual-threaded load configuration.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs libmoon's l2-forward example so the DUT forwards traffic during the load-generator measurement window.

per_entity_results.generated: This script conducts a latency and energy measurement test for Layer 2 packet forwarding under variable load conditions. It synchronizes test phases, captures energy consumption during packet transmission, and logs results for analysis. The experiment evaluates network device performance by varying packet rate and size parameters.
per_entity_results.reference: Forwarder that synchronizes with the load-generator node, records energy usage and forwards the received packets back to the load-generator node.

per_entity_results.generated: Each iteration executes a Layer 2 forwarding latency benchmark with configurable packet rate and packet size parameters, measuring energy consumption and operational latency under varying network load conditions. The test runs a Lua-based forwarding application on a remote hardware platform, capturing performance metrics during sustained traffic generation.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the libmoon l2-forward script to forward the received packets from the loadgen node.
